CustomField.description: For field update. The field API separated by semi-colon e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c of the target object or the parent object defined in the object relation field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For field update. The field API separated by semi-colon e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c of the target object or the parent object defined in the object relation field.
CustomField.label: Object Fields
